purpose: Turn a creator capsule into a public-safe motion storyboard before any video renderer, model, or private media path is allowed to run.

canvas.delivery: single fixed-canvas storyboard proof plus future contact-sheet bridge

timeline.composition: quiet paper field, capsule intent enters as a small blue proof mark
timeline.motion: single-line reveal from left edge; no footage

timeline.composition: typographic grammar tiles pin to a strict editorial grid
timeline.motion: tiles snap with one-beat delay; amber memory rail wakes

timeline.composition: poster route, prompt DNA route, and storyboard route compete as three proof lanes
timeline.motion: lanes compress until retained lanes stay bright

timeline.composition: black boundary card blocks raw media, local paths, client copy, account UI
timeline.motion: redacted strips sweep across prohibited inputs

timeline.composition: seed, aspect ratio, duration, surface target, model family appear as handles
timeline.motion: handles orbit the proof object without changing capsule memory

timeline.composition: final frame names the storyboard, commands, and publishable proof path
timeline.motion: proof stamp lands; future renderer stays external

blocked: client copy or unreleased brand assets

retention: Retain this route as the bridge between static creator artifacts and future video/contact-sheet QA. It is not a renderer; it is the public-safe storyboard contract that prevents raw media leakage before render work begins.
